title: 30 Years of Juma

hero.heading: Celebrating 30 Years of Impact
hero.subheading: To celebrate our 30th anniversary we have created this space where we'll share stories, memories, and photos from our work over the past three decades. We have exciting upcoming events, including our 30th Anniversary Gala, where you can join us in our celebration of this incredible milestone.

intro: To celebrate our 30th anniversary we have created this space where we'll share stories, memories, and photos from our work over the past three decades. We have exciting upcoming events, including our 30th Anniversary Gala, where you can join us in our celebration of this incredible milestone.

sections.heading: Our 30-Year Journey
sections.body: A look back at Juma's journey over three decades of making possible, possible for young people.

sections.heading: Paths to Possibility Gala
sections.body:
We hope you will consider joining us on this special night where we'll celebrate 30 years of making possible, possible for young people.

**Date:** October 28, 2023

**Event Location:** Four Seasons, 757 Market St., San Francisco, CA 94103

**Time:** 6:00 PM – 11:00 PM

[Gala Tickets](https://event.auctria.com/8b2a0f96-785b-4cca-88af-698a523184b6/a809178051b511ea91bae14d12592328)

[Paths to Possibility Video](https://vimeo.com/369935842)

sections.heading: Meet Our Youth, Alumni, and the Community Who Has Made Juma What It Is Today
sections.body:
Over the past 30 years Juma has employed more than 10,000 low-income youth who have earned $13 million in wages, saved $6.4 million for higher education and generated $40 million in enterprise revenue to continue advancing our mission.

**Spotlights:**

sections.heading: 30 for 30 Campaign
sections.body:
As we celebrate our 30th anniversary, our goal is to raise $30,000 to ensure that even more young people can continue to benefit from Juma's programming which includes employment, financial capability, career coaching, and connections to education and career pathways.

Your gift has the power to make a lasting impact and transform lives. Thank you for supporting Juma's 30 for 30 Campaign as we commemorate 30 incredible years of impact.

[Donate](https://www.classy.org/campaign/30-for-30-campaign/c494618)

seoDescription: Celebrating 30 years of Juma's impact: stories, memories, and photos from three decades of employing low-income youth, plus the Paths to Possibility Gala and the 30 for 30 Campaign.
